{{Infobox character
| name = Zakariel
| aliases = Zakariel the Fox
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Fox|the Fox]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[judge|Judge]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Zakariel, also known as the [[Fox]], is a highly selfish individual who primarily acts when there is a direct benefit to her. She possesses the ability to flicker through existence and move in and out of reality, which she uses to evade attacks from armies or massive lightning strikes. In combat, she is a dangerous predator capable of killing [[Silverlords]] and using a dagger to strike targets from vast distances. While she has been seen hiding behind [[Ozriel]], she is also a capable combatant who has engaged with the [[Wolf]], [[Razael]]. Zakariel appears as a young-looking girl with five tails and has expressed a desire to be called [[Zerachiel]]. Her motivations are driven by an interest in attaining true power, and she has displayed a cynical attitude toward others' loyalty.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Zakariel]] raids [[Iterations]] under [[Vroshir]] assault to collect valuables.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Zakariel]] is a rival to [[the Angler of the Crystal Halls]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Zakariel]] is the [[Fox]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Zakariel]] uses a dagger.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] intends to contact [[Zakariel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Zakariel]] the [[Fox]] appeared from a blue rift into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Zakariel]] is a [[Judge]] who scampered away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
